member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.DataModel.JsonSchemaMsgPackExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for converting MessagePack schemas to CLI JsonSchema

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.DataModel.JsonSchemaMsgPackExtensions.ToJsonSchema(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchemaMsgPack)
member.summary: Converts this MessagePack schema to a JSON/YAML-compatible schema

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.SchemaRepository
member.summary: Repository for JSON schemas loaded from embedded MessagePack resources

member.name: P:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.SchemaRepository.CopilotStudioSchema
member.summary: CopilotStudio JSON Schema - deserialized from embedded MessagePack

member.name: P:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.SchemaRepository.FoundrySchema
member.summary: Foundry JSON Schema - deserialized from embedded MessagePack

member.name: P:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.SchemaRepository.SydneySchema
member.summary: Sydney JSON Schema - deserialized from embedded MessagePack

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionAnalyzer
member.summary: Analyzes type composition by examining properties and their types

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionAnalyzer.AnalyzeComposition(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Analyzes the composition of a type

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionAnalyzer.CollectAllProperties(System.String,Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Collects all properties including those from base types

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionAnalyzer.AnalyzeProperty(System.String,Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Analyzes a property and its type

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionAnalyzer.IsAbstractType(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Checks if a type is abstract

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionAnalyzer.ExtractTypeNameFromRef(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts type name from a $ref string

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionInfo
member.summary: Information about a type's composition

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.PropertyInfo
member.summary: Information about a property

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.ContextProvider
member.summary: Provides context information about the current working environment

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.ContextProvider.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new ContextProvider for the specified working directory

member.name: P:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.ContextProvider.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: Gets the current working directory

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.ContextProvider.GetTargetProduct
member.summary: Detects the target product from the current context
member.returns: The detected target product (copilot-studio, foundry, or sydney)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.ContextProvider.HasCopilotStudioAgent
member.summary: Checks if the current directory contains a Copilot Studio agent

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.ContextProvider.GetAgentRootDirectory
member.summary: Gets the agent root directory (if in an agent context)

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder
member.summary: Builds inheritance hierarchies for types

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder.BuildHierarchy(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Builds a hierarchy tree for a given type

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder.BuildAncestors(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Builds the ancestor chain (base types going up)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder.BuildDescendants(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Builds the descendant tree (derived types going down)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder.CollectDescendants(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyNode},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Recursively collects descendants

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder.IsAbstractType(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Checks if a type is abstract

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyBuilder.CountProperties(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Counts the number of properties in a type

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyInfo
member.summary: Represents a complete hierarchy structure

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyNode
member.summary: Represents a single node in the hierarchy

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.LS.MarkResolver.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Build a new instance of MarkResolver, utility to optimize conversion from "Line+Column" to "Index".

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.LS.MarkResolver.GetRangesInLines(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a start position and length to in-bounds ranges across lines.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.LS.ObjectModelExtensions.FindElementBySyntaxUri(Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.BotElement,System.Uri)
member.summary: Given an element parsed from a file, find the matching element in the list of descendant of a BotDefinition.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer
member.summary: Indexes schema definitions for fast lookup and relationship traversal

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.GetTypeDefinition(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a type definition by name

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.GetTypeDefinitionByNameOrKind(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a type definition by either type name or kind value. Tries type name first, then kind value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.GetTypeNameFromNameOrKind(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the actual type name from either type name or kind value. Returns the properly cased type name.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.GetBaseType(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the base type name for a given type

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.GetDerivedTypes(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all types that derive from the given type

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.GetAllTypeDefinitions
member.summary: Gets all type definitions

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.ExtractTypeNameFromRef(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts type name from a $ref string

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.ExtractKindValue(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Extracts the kind value (const) from a schema's kind property

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer.BuildIndexes
member.summary: Builds indexes for fast lookup

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaLoader
member.summary: Loads JSON schemas from the schema repository with lazy initialization

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaLoader.GetSchema(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a schema by target product name (lazy loaded on first access)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaLoader.GetAvailableProducts
member.summary: Gets all available target products

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.Validation.ValidateYaml(System.String)
member.summary: Validates YAML content against the schema by deserializing it and collecting diagnostics.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.Diagnostic
member.summary: Represents a validation diagnostic (error, warning, or info)
